title: Progress Test
objectives: Assess vocabulary from Unit 8 (weekend plans, family trips, pearl diving)
Test reading comprehension about a family beach trip
Evaluate grammar: future (going to) and past simple (did not + base verb)
Assess guided writing about last weekend

exercises.problem: I'm ............ for my family every day. (a. grateful, b. perfect, c. funny)
My mother's bag is made of ............ (a. hobbies, b. ideas, c. pearls)
The family ............ food and some warm clothes for camping. (a. began, b. laughed, c. packed)
He wrote his favourite ............ in my diary. (a. parents, b. memories, c. caravans)
Read about Sara's family beach trip. The best title: (a. A Cruise Ship, b. A Wonderful Day, c. A Coin On The Sand)
The underlined word 'He' in line 5 refers to: (a. Salem, b. diver, c. Saad)
Sara told her parents about her idea to: (a. make a sandcastle, b. check the map, c. pack the bags)
How did the family feel after sunset?
Next month, we are going to ............ by plane. (a. travel, b. travelled, c. travelling)
My father didn't ............ the house early. (a. leaves, b. left, c. leave)
Yesterday, the teacher ............ us a video about Kuwait. (a. shows, b. showed, c. showing)
Write about 'Last Weekend' using guide words: visited-grandmother, told-memories, wonderful-time
exercises.answer: Last weekend, I visited my grandmother. She told us wonderful memories. We had a wonderful time together.

exercises.problem: Complete: 1. We slept in the __________ near the beach. 2. He likes travelling by __________. 3. It's a beautiful __________.

teaching_notes: Final progress test covers both grammar points: going to (future) and did not + base verb (past negative). The reading passage about Sara's family beach trip integrates vocabulary from multiple units (cruise, diver, sandcastle, coins). Grammar section tests three structures: going to + base verb, didn't + base verb, and past simple affirmative.
